scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @qingxier/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @qingxier/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @qingxier/miniprogram && npm run typecheck --workspace @qingxier/admin
scripts.test: npm run test:ci --workspace @qingxier/server && npm run test:ci --workspace @qingxier/miniprogram && npm run test:ci --workspace @qingxier/admin
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @qingxier/contracts && npm run build --workspace @qingxier/server && npm run build:mp-weixin --workspace @qingxier/miniprogram && npm run build --workspace @qingxier/admin
scripts.verify:server: npm run typecheck --workspace @qingxier/server && npm run test:ci --workspace @qingxier/server && npm run build --workspace @qingxier/server
scripts.verify:miniprogram: npm run typecheck --workspace @qingxier/miniprogram && npm run test:ci --workspace @qingxier/miniprogram && npm run build:mp-weixin --workspace @qingxier/miniprogram
scripts.verify:admin: npm run typecheck --workspace @qingxier/admin && npm run test:ci --workspace @qingxier/admin && npm run build --workspace @qingxier/admin
